pipelines.name: pallet_defect_detection
pipelines.pipeline: {auto_source} ! decodebin ! videoconvert ! gvadetect name=detection ! queue ! gvawatermark displ-cfg=font-scale=1.0,draw-txt-bg=false ! gvafpscounter ! gvametaconvert add-empty-results=true name=metaconvert ! gvametapublish name=destination ! appsink name=appsink
